title: Assignment 1
text:
This assignment demonstrates a simple R calculation and a basic plot.


In this part we perform a simple arithmetic operation in R.

1 + 1

[1] 2


The result above shows how R evaluates basic expressions.



Here we create a simple scatter plot using the built-in cars dataset.

plot(cars)








The plot displays the relationship between car speed and stopping distance.
